Alien - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.examples.settings.lookup
Represents an alien from an arbitrary galaxy (possibly from Irk) in a spaceship.

attack() - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.examples.settings.lookup.Alien
Launches an attack based on an attack plan from the quantum database

Defines when and where an alien attack should occur.

Shows how to register a quantum database in the global Registry.

S
